content.full_text:
July 12, 1990

Ms. Linda Moureaux  
Fair Political Practices Comm.  
428 J. Street, #610  
Sacramento, CA 94814

Dear Ms. Moureaux:

This letter is to confirm in writing the information we have received verbally regarding the Lompoc City Council election. One incumbent councilman, J.D. Smith, had planned to run for his four year seat in the upcoming November election. We have already formed a committee and filed Forms 501, 502, and 410. We will be filing the financial disclosure form prior to July 31, 1990 showing all the funds raised through June 30, 1990.

Recently, the incumbent Mayor announced he would not be seeking re-election. J.D. Smith has now decided to run for the Mayor's position on the City Council (a two year term) rather than for his present four year term seat. We want to follow the rules in making a change from "Smith for Council" to "Smith for Mayor."

The proper procedure as we have been directed is as follows:

1. File new Forms 501 and 502 in name of "Smith for Mayor".
2. Open new bank account, "Smith for Mayor".
3. File new Form 410.
4. Transfer funds from the old "Smith for Council" account into the new "Smith for Mayor" account.
5. File Form 415 terminating old committee.
6. Carry on with new Committee in the normal manner.

If we have accurately set forth the proper procedures, would you please approve a copy of this letter and return to me. If not, please write as soon as possible directing us in the proper methodology. You may call me at (805) 736-7534 if you have any questions. Thanks for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Al Walker  
Campaign Manager  
Smith for Council

Approved by: ____________________________ Date: ________________  
Fair Political Practices Comm.

AL/09:LMour
